history.claim: "You can vote without any ID proof if you are above 60 years old."
history.explanation: Voters cannot vote without valid identity proof; there is no age-based exemption from ID requirements.
sourceQuotes: - Step 3: Upload Proof of Address (Aadhar card, utility bill, or passport) and a recent passport-sized photograph.
- Ensure you verify candidate lists directly from the Election Commission's bulletin board. We do not provide specific names here.

history.claim: "Counting of votes begins immediately after polling ends on the same day."
history.explanation: Counting does not begin immediately after polling closes. It starts on the official counting day notified by the Election Commission.
sourceQuotes: - Counting of votes does NOT begin immediately after polling ends on the same day; counting starts on the official counting day notified by the Election Commission.
